messages.content: 你是一个代码架构师。你刚刚完成了一次系统分解。接下来会有人就你的设计决策提出问题。请如实回答。

我将 project_real 分解为 11 个子节点：
- CommandRouter: Parse the input JSON, extract the command and project_data, and route to the appropriate handler based on the command string.
- CreateProjectHandler: Handle create_project command: validate owner exists, create project with default status planning, record creation time.
- UpdateProjectHandler: Handle update_project command: validate project exists, update fields, record status changes.
- DeleteProjectHandler: Handle delete_project command: validate project exists, delete project and all its tasks.
- CreateTaskHandler: Handle create_task command: validate project exists and is planning/active, create task with default status todo.
- AssignTaskHandler: Handle assign_task command: validate task exists and is unassigned/reassignable, validate member exists and available, update assignee and member status.
- UpdateTaskStatusHandler: Handle update_task_status command: validate task exists, enforce status flow, record actual_hours when done.
- CompleteTaskHandler: Handle complete_task command: validate task is in review, set status to done, record actual_hours, release member.
- DeleteTaskHandler: Handle delete_task command: validate task exists, delete task, release member if assigned.
- QueryHandler: Handle all query commands: list_project_tasks, get_member_tasks, get_project_progress. These are read-only operations that aggregate data.
- MemberManagementHandler: Handle add_member and update_member_availability commands: add new member with unique ID, update member availability with active task check.

分解理由：The Project_Task_Manager is decomposed into 10 children that form a tree structure with CommandRouter as the root coordinator. CommandRouter parses the input JSON and routes to the appropriate handler based on the command string. Each handler is an atomic operation that handles one or two related commands, performing validation and data operations on the in-memory data stores. The handlers are: CreateProjectHandler, UpdateProjectHandler, DeleteProjectHandler, CreateTaskHandler, AssignTaskHandler, UpdateTaskStatusHandler, CompleteTaskHandler, DeleteTaskHandler, QueryHandler (for read-only queries), and MemberManagementHandler (for member CRUD). This decomposition ensures each child has a single responsibility, minimal overlap, and collectively covers all 13 functional requirements. The parent's global_vars (read_write on members, projects, tasks) are distributed among children based on their data access needs. Children use requested_capabilities to access data interfaces, ensuring separation of concerns.
请解释你对这个节点输入格式的理解。command 参数的含义是什么？
